## LOLLIPOP chart, SHILPA style

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Every position, size, and color below is exact. No adjectives, no improvisation.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-RNK-03",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "ranking",
    "comparison"
  ],
  "form": "stick + dot, sorted descending",
  "data_required": "one categorical dimension + one non-negative measure; lighter ink than bars",
  "family": "RNK",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-RNK-01 (denser data)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "many close values",
      "use": "CH-RNK-01"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- ranking where bars would overwhelm the page (many rows, light values)
- editorial pages that want less ink

Do NOT use when:
- values very close together (dots overlap visually less than bars separate)
- natural order (CH-MAG-01)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title with a number",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit": "on first value label",
  "categories": "array of {label, value >= 0, highlight?}"
}
```

### Rules
- sorted descending
- stick from zero to value, dot at value
- one highlight maximum
- unit once

### Never do this
- dots without sticks (loses the zero anchor)
- truncated baseline

### QA before delivering
- [ ] descending order
- [ ] sticks start at zero
- [ ] highlight <= 1
- [ ] unit once
- [ ] source present

| Element | Color |
|---|---|
| background | `#FBFDFF` |
| stick | `#C6D5E0` |
| dot | `#C6D5E0` |
| dot_highlight | `#1B6E8F` |
| category_label | `#33424E` |
| value_label | `#143D59` |
| baseline | `#C6D5E0` |
| title | `#143D59` |
| source | `#33424E` |

### Fonts

- Title font: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 600
- All other text: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 400 (600 on highlighted items)

### Language chrome

No kicker, no eyebrow; title at the default y.
